project.description: The project you want to operate on. Choose from the list, or specify an ID.

section.description: Section to which you want move the task. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

labels.description: Optional labels that will be assigned to a created task. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression.

dueDateTime.description: Specific date and time in RFC3339 format in UTC

dueLang.description: 2-letter code specifying language in case due_string is not written in English

dueString.description: Human defined task due date (ex.: “next Monday”, “Tomorrow”). Value is set using local (not UTC) time.

parentId.description: The parent task you want to operate on. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

section.description: The section you want to operate on. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return

ids.description: A list of the task IDs to retrieve, this should be a comma-separated list

labelId.description: Filter tasks by label. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

lang.description: IETF language tag defining what language filter is written in, if differs from default English

parentId.description: Filter tasks by parent task ID. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

projectId.description: Filter tasks by project ID. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

sectionId.description: Filter tasks by section ID. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

dueDateTime.description: Specific date and time in RFC3339 format in UTC

dueLang.description: 2-letter code specifying language in case due_string is not written in English

dueString.description: Human defined task due date (ex.: “next Monday”, “Tomorrow”). Value is set using local (not UTC) time.

labels.description: Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression
